title: ResolveTrace
description: Wire format for LLMResolveResult.to_dict — language-grounding evaluation and UI display consume this shape. Stable as of v1.

query.description: The effective query handed to the resolver (may include any free_text clarification appended by the caller).

candidates.description: Final ranking — either the LLM-rewritten order or the deterministic order when the LLM was rejected / unparseable.

base_candidates.description: The deterministic resolver's ranking, preserved so callers can diff against the LLM rewrite.

llm_pick.description: Node id the LLM nominated, when parseable. Null when the reply was unparseable or out-of-pool.

llm_reason.description: One-line justification the LLM supplied, when parseable. Null otherwise.

used_fallback.description: True iff the LLM pick was rejected (unparseable or out-of-pool) and the deterministic ranking was kept.

embedding_scores.description: Per-candidate cosine similarity scores when a query_encoder was supplied. Empty otherwise. Scalars only — raw vectors are never serialized.

clarification.description: Populated when ambiguity was detected. Null otherwise.
